title: Black&White Lamps
description: Retextured version of lamp when off fully black when on fully white.
body:
**Works Fine from 1.13 to 1.21.8, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
# Black & White lamps by Silent!

## 📜 Description
This resource pack makes the **Lamps BLACK when off WHITE when on**.
Perfect for **Redstoners** who are making mega display or a CPU'S

---

## ✨ Features
- 🔹 Lamps are black and white.
- 🔹 No more changes.

---

## 🎮 Best For
- Mega Redstone Display or CPU projects.

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note
1. Tested on Vanilla Minecraft Only not tested with mods
2. **Works Fine from 1.13 to 1.21.8, It can shows warning while applying don't worry it will work fine**
3. Fully tested by me if not works not my problem
